doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: Key identifiers and detailed provisions (EAJP-2025 title, effective date, EAJP certification/CLE hours, EAJP-Form 1A, and the specific “Business & Professions Code §6125” waiver language) are not verifiable as real State Bar/Legal Services
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED  
CONFIDENCE: 90  
REASON: The named “California Emergency Access to Justice Protocol (EAJP-2025)” and its specific provisions (effective date, certification requirements, named forms, and cited statute “§6125”) do not correspond to verifiable, standard California State Bar/Legal Services Trust Fund Commission protocol language and appear internally invented.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED  
CONFIDENCE: 90  
REASON: Key identifiers and detailed provisions (EAJP-2025 title, effective date, EAJP certification/CLE hours, EAJP-Form 1A, and the specific “Business & Professions Code §6125” waiver language) are not verifiable as real State Bar/Legal Services Trust Fund Commission materials and read like invented policy text.
